scripts.expand-lambda-functions: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { param([string] $sourceArg, [string] $outputArg) $sourcePath = if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($sourceArg)) { (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $sourceArg).Path } else { $file = Get-ChildItem -Path .\Excel -File -Filter '4_1_ManureManagement_Feedlot_WIP_v*.xlsx' | Where-Object { $_.BaseName -notmatch '(?i)_expanded(?:_tmp\d*)?$' } | Sort-Object @{ Expression = { if ($_.BaseName -match '_v(\d+)$') { [int] $matches[1] } else { -1 } } }, FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $file) { throw 'No Feedlot workbook found under .\Excel.' }; $file.FullName }; $out = if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($outputArg)) { $outputArg } else { Join-Path (Split-Path $sourcePath -Parent) (( '{0}_expanded{1}' -f [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($sourcePath), [System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($sourcePath))) }; & powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\expand-veerg-lambda-references.ps1 -SourceWorkbook $sourcePath -OutputWorkbook $out }"
scripts.expand-lambda-functions:dry: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { param([string] $sourceArg, [string] $outputArg) $sourcePath = if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($sourceArg)) { (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $sourceArg).Path } else { $file = Get-ChildItem -Path .\Excel -File -Filter '4_1_ManureManagement_Feedlot_WIP_v*.xlsx' | Where-Object { $_.BaseName -notmatch '(?i)_expanded(?:_tmp\d*)?$' } | Sort-Object @{ Expression = { if ($_.BaseName -match '_v(\d+)$') { [int] $matches[1] } else { -1 } } }, FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $file) { throw 'No Feedlot workbook found under .\Excel.' }; $file.FullName }; $out = if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($outputArg)) { $outputArg } else { Join-Path (Split-Path $sourcePath -Parent) (( '{0}_expanded{1}' -f [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($sourcePath), [System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($sourcePath))) }; & powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\expand-veerg-lambda-references.ps1 -SourceWorkbook $sourcePath -OutputWorkbook $out -DryRun }"
scripts.expand-lambda-functions:debug: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { param([string] $sourceArg, [string] $outputArg) $sourcePath = if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($sourceArg)) { (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $sourceArg).Path } else { $file = Get-ChildItem -Path .\Excel -File -Filter '4_1_ManureManagement_Feedlot_WIP_v*.xlsx' | Where-Object { $_.BaseName -notmatch '(?i)_expanded(?:_tmp\d*)?$' } | Sort-Object @{ Expression = { if ($_.BaseName -match '_v(\d+)$') { [int] $matches[1] } else { -1 } } }, FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $file) { throw 'No Feedlot workbook found under .\Excel.' }; $file.FullName }; $out = if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($outputArg)) { $outputArg } else { Join-Path (Split-Path $sourcePath -Parent) (( '{0}_expanded{1}' -f [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($sourcePath), [System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($sourcePath))) }; & powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\expand-veerg-lambda-references.ps1 -SourceWorkbook $sourcePath -OutputWorkbook $out -DebugFailedWrites }"
scripts.expand-lambda-functions:auto: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$files = Get-ChildItem -Path .\Excel -File -Include *.xlsx,*.xlsm -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '(?i)(^|[\\/])Old([\\/]|$)' -and $_.BaseName -notmatch '(?i)_expanded(?:_tmp\d*)?$' } | Sort-Object FullName; if ($files.Count -eq 0) { throw 'No workbook found under .\Excel excluding Old folders and expanded outputs.' }; foreach ($f in @($files)) { $out = Join-Path $f.DirectoryName (( '{0}_expanded{1}' -f [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($f.Name), $f.Extension)); & powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\expand-veerg-lambda-references.ps1 -SourceWorkbook $f.FullName -OutputWorkbook $out }"
scripts.expand-lambda-functions:auto:dry: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$files = Get-ChildItem -Path .\Excel -File -Include *.xlsx,*.xlsm -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '(?i)(^|[\\/])Old([\\/]|$)' -and $_.BaseName -notmatch '(?i)_expanded(?:_tmp\d*)?$' } | Sort-Object FullName; if ($files.Count -eq 0) { throw 'No workbook found under .\Excel excluding Old folders and expanded outputs.' }; foreach ($f in @($files)) { $out = Join-Path $f.DirectoryName (( '{0}_expanded{1}' -f [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($f.Name), $f.Extension)); & powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\expand-veerg-lambda-references.ps1 -SourceWorkbook $f.FullName -OutputWorkbook $out -DryRun }"
